nodes.label: Rate Limit Settings (BATCH_SIZE, DELAY_*, MAX_RETRIES, RETRY_BACKOFF)
nodes.rationale: Eikon/LSEG API allows ~5 req/s and ~300 req/min. Exponential backoff on rate-limit errors (code 400.3001) prevents prolonged blocking. Default 0.5s between companies and 1.5s between batches keeps throughput safe across 5000+ company runs.
nodes.norm_label: rate limit settings (batch_size, delay_*, max_retries, retry_backoff)

nodes.label: LSEG Data API Migration (eikon → lseg-data)
nodes.rationale: Migrated from deprecated `eikon` package to `lseg-data` (LSEG's actively maintained replacement). Key API surface changes: ld.open_session() replaces ek.set_app_key(); ld.get_data() replaces ek.get_data(); ld.get_symbology() replaces ek.get_symbology(); error type is lseg.data.errors.LsegDataError.

nodes.label: Tutorial Screenshot — Refinitiv Eikon Financial Summary UI
nodes.norm_label: tutorial screenshot — refinitiv eikon financial summary ui

nodes.label: Crash Recovery / Checkpoint Pattern
nodes.rationale: Checkpoint file written after every single company so worst-case data loss from a crash is exactly one company. Failed companies are retried on re-run; completed companies are skipped. Reset removes the file entirely to restart from scratch.

nodes.label: Refinitiv TR.F.* Standardised Field Namespace
nodes.rationale: Using STD (standardised) rather than IAS/GAAP/ORI normalises financial line items across all companies regardless of local filing standard, enabling cross-country comparisons.

nodes.label: Live Excel Cross-Sheet Formula Ratios
nodes.rationale: Ratios sheet uses live Excel formulas referencing the three statement sheets so they recalculate if source data is edited. IFERROR wraps every formula to suppress divide-by-zero and missing data gracefully.

nodes.label: Single-File API Isolation (fetcher.py only imports lseg-data)
nodes.rationale: fetcher.py is the ONLY file that imports lseg_data. All other pipeline modules are API-agnostic. This design means swapping data providers requires changing only one file.
nodes.norm_label: single-file api isolation (fetcher.py only imports lseg-data)
